During covid situation, two blood reports were required. As the arranger was from Mumbai, SRL was thought to be the good lab. Two home pick-ups done by staff Dnyaneshwar. Syringes used were from a plastic sealed one. Fresh gloves used, then discarded in discard bag alongwith syringe and deposited in waste basket. After a gap, second time again required so called them again. This time a girl is sent, who continuously talking on the phone whilst working. The arm band pinchd the arm till blood clot formed and hurtful.  Needle used from an open plastic container-unsealed. Pre-used, torn, dirty gloves used. Operator so busy on Phone, didn't acknowledge protest about glove or needle. She interrupted her phone only long enough to loosen arm band. Next day Dnyaneshwar calls saying more blood needed. Is this a game? On query if the technician team didn't know in advance how much was required, and if proper technician couldn't be sent, he starts yelling before confirmation that we are telling lies. He comes to our house, then sends the girl to our house yelling that we're wrong. Printout given half only. 4500+4500+7500 including three home visit charges, making us feel as if free services taken so we have to putup with dadagiri.
